text:
is one of six detailed radiology revenue center amounts (RDLGY_ONCOLOGY_AMT, 
RDLGY_DGNSTC_AMT, RDLGY_THRPTC_AMT, RDLGY_NUCLR_MDCN_AMT, RDLGY_CT_SCAN_AMT, 
RDLGY_OTHR_IMGNG_AMT). 

Note that the sum of all the radiology charge amounts is available all years (field called RDLGYAMT).
